title: Payment
onlinePaymentDescription: Online payment with all bank cards
onlinePaymentInfo: The payment gateway limit is 195 million Tomans. You can complete the remaining amount in a separate transaction.
insufficientWalletBalance: Your wallet balance is not sufficient for this order.
discountCodeDescription: You can select from saved codes if available, or enter a code yourself.
sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and retry.
loadError: Failed to load payment data. Please try again.
gatewayLoadError: Failed to load payment gateways. Please try again.
cartRefreshError: Failed to refresh cart. Please try again.
selectGatewayValidation: Please select a payment gateway to continue.
invalidGatewayResponse: Payment gateway returned an invalid response. Please try again.
requestError: Payment request failed. Please try again.
successNextHint: You can follow the latest status from your profile whenever you need it.
successReceiptDescription: Your order receipt and payment status are saved in your profile.
successPreparationDescription: We will start processing your purchase and update your order history.
successSecureDescription: Your payment confirmation has been received through the gateway.
failureMessage: Your payment could not be completed. Please try again.
failureHelpHint: Most payment failures are temporary. You can retry safely from here.
failureCheckCardDescription: Make sure the bank gateway completed the payment before retrying.
failureCartSafeDescription: You can review your cart and start the payment again.
failureSupportDescription: If money was deducted, contact support with the payment details below.
failureDebugHint: Share these details with support if the problem continues.
systemBusyMessage: The payment gateway is temporarily busy. Please wait 15 minutes and try again.

failureReason.gatewayCallback: The bank reported payment failure or did not return a track ID.
failureReason.orderNotFound: Order was not found. The return link may have expired.
failureReason.trackIdMismatch: Payment track ID does not match the order.
failureReason.gatewayNotFound: Zibal payment gateway is not active or configured.
failureReason.verifyFailed: Zibal could not verify this payment.
failureReason.verifyError: An error occurred while contacting Zibal verify API.
